description.zh:
归根结底，你的帮助对我至关重要，所以我必须原谅你的过去。但别以为我会忘记你的伎俩，毕竟它对我的生意造成了一些无法弥补的损害。你何不付我一点费用来弥补部分损失呢，嗯？

我知道你不是那种随便把钱扔给任何人的人，但是嘿……得了吧，你知道你自己搞砸了，我的哥们，你对我就像兄弟一样，你也知道这一点，我永远不会对你做出那样的事！好吧，我不再演戏了，但你有工作要做，我的朋友，明白吗？
description.en:
At the end of the day, your help is essential to me, so I must forgive you for the past. But don't think that I will forget your stunt, after all it caused some irrepairable damage to my business. How about you pay me a little fee to cover some of the damage, hmm?

I know you're not the kind of person to throw money around to anyone, but hey... Come on now, you know that yourself, you messed up my guy, you were like a brother to me and you knew that too, I would have never pulled something like that on you! Fine, I'll quit the dramatic act, but you have work to do my friend, got it?

name.zh: 赶紧把这事办了 - 第3部分
name.en: Let's Get This Over With - Part 3
